ec2.clientvpnauthorizationrule.AccessGro.Description: The ID of the group to grant access to, for example, the Active Directory group or identity provider (IdP) group. Required if `AuthorizeAllGroups` is `false` or not specified.

ec2.clientvpnauthorizationrule.Authorize.Description: Indicates whether to grant access to all clients. Specify `true` to grant all clients who successfully establish a VPN connection access to the network. Must be set to `true` if `AccessGroupId` is not specified.

ec2.clientvpnauthorizationrule.ClientVpn.Description: The ID of the Client VPN endpoint.

ec2.clientvpnauthorizationrule.Descripti.Description: A brief description of the authorization rule.

ec2.clientvpnauthorizationrule.TargetNet.Description: The IPv4 address range, in CIDR notation, of the network for which access is being authorized.
